steps.title: Use the contrast about research
steps.content: The sentence contrasts studies of high altitude with research on places below sea level, which has received comparatively little notice. The blank therefore needs a word meaning abundant or plentiful.

steps.title: Filter the vocabulary options
steps.content: Choice A means early or incomplete, not numerous. Choice C means ambiguous, describing clarity rather than quantity. Choice D means infrequent or irregular, which is too close to receiving little notice. The answer is B.
